content.text:
I've opened the "Sales by Category" chart (SalesByCategory) — it highlights which product categories are underperforming. Use the year selector to compare 2024 vs 2025.

Would you like me to:
- Show the categories with the lowest revenue (ranked)?
- Compare current vs previous year performance (SalesByCategoryWithPrevYear)?
- Drill into product-level sales for the low-performing categories (TopProductsByCategory)?
- Export the chart or a report?

Which option do you prefer?
